title: デビュー戦の後に・2人だけの船出

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan runs well in her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She happily talks about being able to report the
good news back to her grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to make a name for herself and advance
to the Classics, we decide to enter the Junior Cup
next.
